channel.title: Vienna Public Transport — Disruptions & Commuter Info
channel.description: Active disruptions, construction works and restrictions from official sources (Wiener Linien, ÖBB, VOR/VAO, City of Vienna).

item.title: N60: Construction26
item.description: Because of construction works in the range Willergasse / Ketzergasse the line N60 is being redirected. Period: From Saturday, 25. July 2026, approximately 06:00 o'clock to … [25.07.2026 – 20.07.2027]
item.content:encoded:
Because of construction works in the range Willergasse / Ketzergasse the line N60 is being redirected. Period: From Saturday, 25. July 2026, approximately 06:00 o'clock to …
[25.07.2026 – 20.07.2027]

item.title: 5A: road works26
item.description: Because of construction works in the range Rotensterngasse the line 5A operating short-running becomes the line 27. July 2026, about 07:00 to expected two weeks. [27.07.2026 – 20.07.2027]
item.content:encoded:
Because of construction works in the range Rotensterngasse the line 5A operating short-running becomes the line 27. July 2026, about 07:00 to expected two weeks.
[27.07.2026 – 20.07.2027]

item.title: 19A: Ada-Christen-Gasse
item.description: Stop transfer of line 19A towards Alaudagasse U Stop: Ada-Christen-Gasse From: Alaudagasse to Ada-Christen-Gasse To: 20 Meter in direction of travel Duration … [20.07.2026 – 20.07.2027]

item.title: 13A: Buses stop at Gumpendorfer Straße to Kopernikusgasse

item.description: Stop transfer of line 13A towards Hauptbahnhof Stop: Haus des Meeres From: KaunitzgasseENT6a722b8cc223fa3dX4X To: Gumpendorfer Straße to Kopernikusgasse (57A) Duration … [17.07.2026 – 14.08.2026]

item.title: Wien Hütteldorf ↔ St. Pölten Hauptbahnhof
item.description: Due to construction works trains between St.Pölten Hbf and Wien Hütteldorf train station (U) at 25.07.2026 are diverted from the trains 1943 and 1945 and from the 26.07.2026 … [Since 20.07.2026]
item.content:encoded:
Due to construction works trains between St.Pölten Hbf and Wien Hütteldorf train station (U) at 25.07.2026 are diverted from the trains 1943 and 1945 and from the 26.07.2026 …
[Since 20.07.2026]

item.title: Rasumofskygasse from 1 to 2
item.description: The tram stop Löwengasse is moved to Löwengasse 47 to 51. Individual traffic is carried over the directional track. [20.07.2026 – 06.09.2026]
item.content:encoded:
The tram stop Löwengasse is moved to Löwengasse 47 to 51. Individual traffic is carried over the directional track.
[20.07.2026 – 06.09.2026]

item.title: Wipplingerstraße 13
item.description: Work is carried out on day or night crossings in the unoccupied time of public transport 1A and 3A of 21:15 to 04:50. At … [20.07.2026 – 31.07.2026]
item.content:encoded:
Work is carried out on day or night crossings in the unoccupied time of public transport 1A and 3A of 21:15 to 04:50. At …
[20.07.2026 – 31.07.2026]
